meanings.definition: an excavation that is (usually) filled with water

examples: the pond was too small for sailing

meanings.definition: an organization of people or resources that can be shared
examples: when he was first hired he was assigned to the pool

meanings.definition: an association of companies for some definite purpose
a small body of standing water (rainwater) or other liquid
examples: there were puddles of muddy water in the road after the rain
the body lay in a pool of blood

meanings.definition: the combined stakes of the betters
something resembling a pool of liquid
examples: he stood in a pool of light
his chair sat in a puddle of books and magazines

meanings.definition: any of various games played on a pool table having 6 pockets
join or form a pool of people
